reviews.review_title: THE best VR RC experience on Quest 3!
reviews.review_description:
As a disabled person who still loves to build RCs irl, This is a great experience. There are times I can't get out in the yard to use my various rc's so this is PERFECT!

From building your first track to racing for hours this one really has you covered.

Please keep adding little things 🙏

I wanted a rc car game that had good graphics and mechanics and you get up to 30-10 points every  day which you can get different cars and trucks with your points and there is different maps for specific vehicles 5 stars

So I log into the game and it automatically says game isn't responding and crashed. Ok fine, reload and then I am in. But before you can race you have to build your RC car, mmmkay sure fine. But then you are instructed to put the wheels on. No wheels. Ooook, well I'm done. Nice try, swing and a miss, game must be made by Ford ...

developer_response.body: Crash should be resolved in the latest build, just accept the "Mic"  popup. There is / was an issue in some cases where the wheels can fall on the floor beside the box. Look beside the package / on the floor. Another possibility is that  they can be removed with the lid. Look inside the lid to see if they are there. Just shake the lid and they shoud fall out. This has also been imporved but not sure if its totaly fixed.

You can try the game for free and buy the other cars later, just try it but don't give up, when you get the hang of it, it is very good.
Special mention to the music, lets say it's special but really fits the game.
There is plenty to do already and the game is in early access.

reviews.review_title: Worst onboarding experience of any game
reviews.review_description:
Couldnt work out what it wanted me to press regarding the controller.

Opened a box. Couldn't find the wheels. Eventually found the wheels hidden underneath everything. Then the back wheels wouldnt go on.

The tablet is a nightmare to use as presses don't register half the time.

If you get to the tutorial and it's a big if then prepare for more frustration. Spent ages again figuring out what it wanted me to do. Especially finding reverse. I think I finally completed the basic tutorials and then gave up. An ordeal.

I want to race a rc car round a track. Let me do that straight away and cut out all the other stuff PLEASE. Give me hints and tips as I drive round the track.

Guys you might have something here but need a serious re-think to onboard players. Simplify the whole process and get people into the main game asap.

developer_response.body: UPDATE:  Please come back and check out the new and improved Tutorial.  We'd love it if you gave us a second chance!

reviews.review_description: The tutorial of the game was the worst it would not let me go to the next stage

reviews.review_title: Surprised at the amount of content.
reviews.review_description:
I've always wanted to race RC cars around a track, and thanks to this game I can! This is an early access title, which has a few things it needs to iron out. The tutorial and setting up your first RC car are probably the biggest things, but those are easy to fix and the devs are already aware. Pretty much everything else about this game is awesome and feels well polished.

There are sandbox modes, stunt tracks, skate parks, and racing circuits. There are time trials, and racing series where you race against bots. There is also multiplayer, a shop where you can browse DLC and test drive cars, and you can customize your cars and your players appearance. For an early access title that is this cheap, this is a no brainer, especially if you are into RC cars. I've been having a blast and can't wait to see this game get even better with future updates.

reviews.review_title: Very good but missing some things.
reviews.review_description: I know it's early access so it's totally understandable. This is the best rc game on Oculus but it has some things that I don't like, only one car is free(in my opinion you should have to earn money by doing races to get the cars OR buy them with money, if you are doing this because you use the money as support you could just make a donate board, if someone is ready to spend some money on the cars in sure they'll be happy to donate and maybe get a supporter hat or something like that. I hope the creator sees this🤞
This game is amazing but it needs to get a upgrade it needs more rc cars
Its a great game if you like rc cars and building them
The qultey is amazing

1. The User Interface is horrible, the menus and the tablet are difficult.  
2. The Graphics are average, without shadow perspective.
3. The Maps are poor, flat or obstructed from view.
4. The Physics are inacurrate, too floaty.
5. The Paywall for other maps and cars is hidden around every corner.
6. The 'game' tries too hard to simulate real life. Such as opening a box with a box cutter, and assembling a car with 5 wheels... takes way too long.
7. The Mixed Reality mode is just a passthrough for a square space.
8. The RC controller always dropping out of my hand, and is just strange to pretend to operate a standard RC controller while holding a two VR controllers.

I applaud the developer for making the Application, but it's another failure to understand that the user just wants to drive RC cars, versus the developer wanting a quick way to generate money.

developer_response.body: Come to Discord.gg/BPG and let's discuss.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded the game got in and i had to build the rc car that was a good way to start when i finished that i suggest we can actually walk the the door instead of just teleporting Outside. Second where is every body it said there were like hundreds of people playing but i couldn't find any servers i made my own and nobody joined. We need more fixes.

reviews.review_title: The best RC game on meta
reviews.review_description: After a somewhat slow tutorial there's near infinite racing and stunt driving to do. I've spent most of my time playing in the sandbox making courses and stunt jumps for myself and my friends. If you like RC cars this is a must have. Every car feels unique and the controls are pretty rock solid once you finally get a feel for them

I have several rc cars in real life and thought this would be good fun to try. I really like the idea of this game and building the rc cars although just adding the wheels was a little bit of a disappointment. I looked for a way to reverse the steering as it is the opposite of how rc remote controls work in real life. I was also a little disappointed with the car that you get at the start as it's quite slow but seems to have a lot of power to spin out on itself, again very different to real life. Also a shame that you have to pay extra to get a different model too.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE:  If you get the latest update the control issue you mentioned has since been resolved.  You do have access to 3 cars, in total, for multiplayer.  

Please join our Discord (Discord.gg/BPG) and we'd be more than happy to assist.

Devs are nice but the cars are a little too pricey and the owner is nice. Also can you guys hook me up with some cars

Even though they use alot of AI generated stuff and the tutorial needs work, this game is actually REALLY good and will scratch that childhood RC itch. Random idea: have maybe one or two random games on the RC ipad like a flappy bird type thing. I just think it would be a silly cool thing

Love this game.  I have always liked RC cars.  There is a little bit of a learning curve to drive the cars.  May be more of a challenge for those who have not driven RC cars before.  Fun tracks.  Build your own.  Race with friends and pick fun at each other when ya crash:)

I've purchased all of the dlc so far and each car drives different and they are all super fun! I'd love to be able to download other users tracks at some point but apart from that it's actually so much fun! Also join their discord, the dev is super responsive and very keen to make the game even better. Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Amazing game I didn't know I wanted.
reviews.review_description:
One of my favourite games on pc was revolt. You raced RC cars around crazy maps while collecting power ups like rockets and speed boosts. 

This game has activated a deep nostalgia for that game. 

So I hope one day you can add a revolt type racer dlc. You already have the onboard camera view, now you just need circuits through city streets and over desks and through supermarkets (a power up/pickup system would be awesome too.) 
Some crazy hot wheels tracks wouldn't be amiss either. 


At the moment the game feels very polished. I enjoy racing around using the on board camera view. It has a lot of content already, although I don't think every map has races yet? Maybe I am wrong. For example I couldn't see any races in the skatepark. 

The single car dlc seems a bit expensive, however I understand what you are going for: free game funded by add-ons. I hope the game is a success and continues to grow. You really have something special here. 

Now I need to go track down a copy of revolt.

reviews.review_title: RC cars for folks without the space
reviews.review_description:
There's a lot of to like here.  It'll end up with at least 7 DLC cars, which I think is great.  It's a really good mix of the different types out there.  In the end it'll be less expensive than even a cheap RC car, let alone the 1/5 scale ones depicted here.  

After the tutorial you're into the the meat and potatoes, which is solid.  There are a couple locations that are just for playing around in, but there are others which contain missions/time trials and/or races for a specific car.  I knew going in that the cars had FPV mode available, but what I didn't know was that they had a ghost car during the time trails.  That impressed me.

I feel like anyone with even a passing interest in RC cars should pick this up, play the single player missions with the starter car, and check out the multiplayer.  I'm guessing you'll like it enough to grab another car (or three haha).  Not the least expensive game in the long run, but a lot less than the other DLC-heavy games.

The car is so difficult to control from remote control view but FPV view gives me so much motion sickness. FPV tunneling option in the setting might help but doesn't seem to do anything when enabled. I see no view tunneling when in FPV mode.

I want to like this game but without more stable FPV camera settings it's basically unplayable.

developer_response.body: There are two settings in the Settings / Comfort tab on the Tablet.  One for FPV mode and one for just walking around.  If you need further assistance contact us on our Discord at Discord.gg/BPG

reviews.review_title: THE FUTURE OF TOP RC RACING IN VR!
reviews.review_description:
VR RACING FOR WILD FRIENDS
Super RC is the nostalgia of RC cars revisited in an immersive VR version: you assemble your car, build crazy ramps, and compete with friends with up to 8 players.
The sandbox mode is particularly successful. It's a real playground: creating tracks, testing impossible jumps, and laughing at the crashes is just perfect for a fun and relaxed session.
The multiplayer mode with up to 8 players adds a social dimension and works well.
It's great to see your friends racing on the same crazy track.
The excellent intro lets you assemble your car right out of the box, using a utility knife! The graphics are beautiful, polished, and inspired, making the game very immersive.
An improvable tutorial, sometimes lacking clarity, guides you through several lessons.
Many camera views are available, from a distance or from inside the car – excellent!
Bit Planet continues to add content (cars, obstacles, modes, customization) and improves the physics and interface. It's a great success for relaxing, laughing, sharing, and having a good time, without aiming for simulation but focusing on pure fun
THE FUTURE OF RC RACING IN VR 
Still in early access, Super RC sometimes lacks polish, such as a more explicit tutorial to get started, but its potential is obvious. It will become a must-have for VR "party racing." If you like creative and friendly games, go for it!.

One of my favorite experiences on quest 3 yet.  Controls are a bit difficult to maintain your groove, wishing I could use a xbox/ps4/rc transmitter for better accuracy.  
Great job on this title, its a hell of an early access f2p

reviews.review_title: RC cars, what else needs to be said?
reviews.review_description: Good silly fun.  Cars are pretty realistic, so there's a bit of a learning curve, but it's fun even if you're terrible at it.  Tons of things to do, it's gonna take me some time to fully dig into this.   I especially like the skate parks!  Tons of customization option, especially with the track builder.  I bought the Founder's pack, and I'm enjoying all 4 cars.  Looking forward to them releasing more cars in the future too.

reviews.review_title: The game idea is good, but there is room
reviews.review_description: The idea of ​​the game is good, and everyone can experience the fun of remote control cars from it. However, as someone who owns an RC car in real life, I feel that the game physics are a bit strange when playing this game. Take GT3 as an example. The rear tire of the remote control car in the game has little grip, and the car's posture is a bit different from that in reality. Moreover, you have to press the front and back of the remote control to have power. Otherwise, the remote control car feels very slow, and it feels like the front and back of the remote control are not linear. I hope that the creative team can improve this problem in the future and add a vehicle adjustment function, so that players can adjust the car to get a better feel.🙏😆

Great game. I always desired to try driving a rc machine but it is very expensive and tricky. But with this game all my desire come true. I have a little complain to do. The game's specification says that internet is unnecessary but to try the race with other cars in the tracks (not multiplayer but only against robotic gamers) i see internet is necessary. I ask to developers if is it possible to implement a game mode where internet is unnecessary to play in solo mode. This request is because when i go on vacation i do not have an internet connection and i cannot play a competition. I hope in a next release.
After a several hours to play i noted that is quite difficult even in beginner mode. I tried many times but i am not be able to win a race. If this is the level of difficulty of beginner mode i guess that the higher leve will be impossible to pass...

Thank you for this awesome game

developer_response.body: Please contact us on our Discord (Discord.gg/BPG) we'd love to learn more about the beginner race experiences.

reviews.review_description: A bit too reduced content, for paid early access. But since the tutorials, challenges and races are well presented and the physics are fun and plausible, ist absolutely worth a Look.

I gotta say this vr games pretty optimized for what it does it fun physics are actually decent and it whole lot cheaper to be in rc hobby with this game now what's nice about game it in early access till sometime next year so there plenty of time for this game to get better and for them to implement qol and content to it before 1.0 and if we get 1000 members on the discord we may get some content I don't know I thought I read that somewhere on the discord any ways I'll see y'all on the track

reviews.review_title: Potential to become the GOAT VR RC sim
reviews.review_description:
At launch this is 100% sandboxy with different play modes (street, skate parks, indoor racing circuit), a basic car and paid DLCs to expand. The cars feel great, their physics feel rewarding and complex that should scratch the "easy to start, hard to master" itch. You can feel the signature attention to the detail of the studio in the level of polish of the cars and their controls. They also added immersive interactions for unboxing the cars and assembling them, which is really cool.

UPDATE: There are two big features that I totally missed and only learned about thanks to the dev's reply to my initial review!! 

1- The industrial building where the track editor is has a series of time trials of increasing difficulty, which gives the game a bit of a single player progression. 

2- If you open a multiplayer lobby in the street, you can place props from a HUGE library and build obstacle courses and improvised stunt tracks. You can move the light objects by hand or you can use a gravity tool. Incredible stuff that you are likely to miss!!!

On the negative side, I feel slight frame drops here and there, even when walking around the shop. And I found a couple of annoying bugs: the turning options changing to "snap turn" for no apparent reason, or even stopping working. I was also stuck several times when going to a purchasing menu from Meta and not being able to cancel and go back. That's likely an OS problem.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for taking the time to write up your thoughts.

We actually have a full Trials and Races system.  Just go to the Jumper Tracks in the Maps menu to get started!

Also, there is a sandbox mode that allows you spawn and place down a variety of ramps and props to make your own obstacles courses.  Just go into MP and start either a private or public sandbox server.  We are adding a Sandbox app to the tablet for singleplayer very soon.

And then once I assembled the car and took the car outside to attempt to drive it in a straight line, I managed to get the car to rev, but not move forwards. Maybe I missed the instruction but apparently u need to hold 2 buttons to drive forwards.. honestly the whole experience felt too hard.
There's a lot of potential, but this game wasn't for me.

reviews.review_description:
Update: a dev has reached out to assist me with my issues. Ill update when its resolved.

Like I said, multiplayer is not working. I got a copy for me and my son. We made it through the training and completed all the tasks to unlock multiplayer. I went in eager to have the multiplayer experience, got my private lobby code, got my son to enter it and the join lobby button is non responsive. I got my son to set up a private lobby and i entered the code, same issue. Pain in the butt man! I ensured both the headsets were joinable as well. 2nd issue, when entering the lobby codes that go nowhere... The uppercase button goes back to lowercase everytime.. I tried to enter a lobby code about 6 times, not one single time was there a lowercase letter in any of the codes.. So why even have a uppercase button.. too irritate me? 
Other then those two issues, I'm okay with the playability.. I'm giving one star mostly because im forced to buy two copies of all multiplayer games because i have two headsets.. I jumped through all the hoops, the least you developers could do is ensure i can play the multiplayer part of the game. Its exhausting dealing with crap like this..

developer_response.body:
Hi, we absolutely want to assist you with this as we've tested Private Games extensively.  Please either send us an email at support@bitplanetgames.com or join our Discord at Discord.gg/BPG and we'd be more than happy to assist you getting this working.

Quick update:  When joining a private server make sure you press the Enter key on the keyboard after entering the code.  (note: the UX for this will be improved in the next update)
